name: eazy-git
author: Jaime Torres
description: CLI tool that simplifies branch management in Git. It automates common workflows and maintains a consistent branch structure.

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.release:prepatch: npm version prepatch && npm run build && npm publish --tag next
scripts.release:preminor: npm version preminor && npm run build && npm publish --tag next
scripts.release:premajor: npm version premajor && npm run build && npm publish --tag next
